description:
**Source:** CLO report P0-005 (P0 — BLOCKING)
**Assigned to Jake for review before agent pickup.**

**Problem:** No NOTICE file identifying the project owner. Required for clear IP chain of title, especially before accepting any external contributions.

**Action:** Create a `NOTICE` file in the repo root with this exact content:
```
HELiXiR
Copyright 2025-2026 Clarity House LLC d/b/a Booked Solid Technology
All rights reserved.

This product is licensed under the MIT License.
See the LICENSE file for details.
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] NOTICE file exists at repo root
- [ ] Entity name matches LICENSE file exactly
- [ ] Year range matches LICENSE file
title: P0-005: Add NOTICE file to HELiXiR repo
